Scenario:
Update Opportunity Stage to "Contract received"
- Pilot_Opportunity__c formula = true
- Opportunity Owner.GTM_Motion_User__c = 'Subscription New Business'
- Stage changed FROM any other stage TO 'Contract received'
Expected Result:
- Customer_360__c record created with:
  • Account__c = Opportunity.AccountId
  • Type__c = 'Pilot Handover'
  • Documentation_Status__c = 'Not Started'
- AE Task created with:
  • Subject from $Label.Handover_AE_Task_Subject
  • WhatId = Linked via ON_Opportunity__c or Opportunity.Id
  • Linked_Opportunity__c = Opportunity reference
  • Related_Account__c = Account.Id
  • OwnerId = Opportunity.OwnerId
  • ActivityDate = Today + 1 working day (excludes weekends)
  • Priority = 'High'
  • Status = 'Open'
Follow-Up / Comment: SLA 1: 1 working day for AE. Filter uses Pilot_Opportunity__c formula + GTM Motion

Scenario:
Update Opportunity Stage to "Contract Received" on a Friday
- Verify AE Task due date uses working days
Expected Result:
- AE Task ActivityDate = Monday (1 working day, skips weekend)
- Working days calculation excludes Saturday/Sunday
Follow-Up / Comment: AE Task now uses working days (not calendar days)

Scenario:
Update Opportunity Stage to "Contract received"
- Account already has Customer_360__c record with Status = 'In Progress'
- Pilot_Opportunity__c = true
Expected Result:
- NEW Customer_360__c record IS created (Flow has no duplicate check)
- AE Task created
- NOTE: Duplicate C360 records may exist - wizard handles by finding latest non-completed record
Follow-Up / Comment: Flow creates new C360 each trigger - wizard finds correct record via query

Scenario:
Update Opportunity Stage to "Closed Won"
- Pilot_Opportunity__c formula = true
- Opportunity Owner.GTM_Motion_User__c = 'Subscription New Business'
- Stage changed FROM any other stage TO 'Closed Won'
Expected Result:
- ACM Task created with:
  • Subject from $Label.Handover_ACM_Task_Subject ('Internal Handover Call planen')
  • OwnerId = Account.OwnerId (ACM)
  • WhatId = Opportunity.Id
  • Related_Account__c = Account.Id
  • ActivityDate = Today + 3 working days
  • Priority = 'High'
  • Status = 'Open'
- NO new Customer_360__c created by Closed Won path
Follow-Up / Comment: SLA 2: 3 working days for ACM. Task links to Opportunity not Account

Scenario:
Update Opportunity Stage to "Closed Won" on a Friday
- Verify ACM Task due date uses working days
Expected Result:
- ACM Task ActivityDate = Wednesday (3 working days: Mon, Tue, Wed)
- Working days calculation excludes Saturday/Sunday
Follow-Up / Comment: Verify weekend exclusion in due date

Scenario:
Update Opportunity directly to "Closed Won" (edge case)
- Account does NOT have existing Customer_360__c record
Expected Result:
- Flow should handle gracefully
- Either: Create C360 + both tasks OR log warning and skip ACM task
- Document actual behavior
Follow-Up / Comment: Edge case - document expected behavior

Scenario:
Test Flow filter exclusions:
Option A: Opportunity Owner.GTM_Motion_User__c != 'Subscription New Business'
Option B: Pilot_Opportunity__c formula = false (wrong record type or not_a_new_customer__c = true)
- Move such Opp to Contract Received or Closed Won
Expected Result:
- NO Customer_360__c record created
- NO AE Task created
- NO ACM Task created
- Flow entry conditions not met
Follow-Up / Comment: Negative test - verify filter on GTM_Motion_User__c and Pilot_Opportunity__c formula

Scenario:
Complete flow with new two-SLA trigger system:
SLA 1 (Contract Received):
1. Move Opp to Contract Received
2. Verify C360 + AE Task created (due: +1 working day)
AE Handover:
3. Open wizard via Prepare Handover button
4. Fill Pre-check section
5. Fill Notes section
6. Review and Submit
7. Verify AE Task = Completed + C360 = Completed
SLA 2 (Closed Won):
8. Move Opp to Closed Won
9. Verify ACM Task created (due: +3 working days)
ACM Completion:
10. Login as ACM
11. Complete IHC Task with feedback
Expected Result: All steps complete successfully as documented above
Follow-Up / Comment: Full regression test with new two-trigger flow
